name: Senolytics exact-effect extraction repair
summary: Updates DKD and AD-risk human records from triage summaries to PubMed abstract-located extraction and adds an IPF abstract-located dosing-completion outcome/result while correcting the IPF randomized-pilot sample size. This remains a partial repair because durable PubMed/PMC source snapshots could not be created by this worker and full article table reconciliation remains open.

scope.question: Repair senolytics exact-effect extraction coverage for DKD, IPF, AD-risk, and D+Q bone reconciliation gaps.

proposed_records.rationale: Tracks the bounded extraction repair candidate and review-lane contract.
Updates the exact-effect coverage gap state after abstract-located extraction progress.
Adds abstract-located DKD sample, dosing, timing, and maturity details.
Adds abstract-located DKD endpoint and timing details.
Adds abstract-located DKD sample, dosing, timing, and directional effect details.
Upgrades the DKD finding from generated triage text to abstract-located evidence wording.
Adds abstract-located AD-risk dose schedule and completion count.
Adds abstract-located AD-risk MoCA and TNF-alpha endpoint details.
Adds abstract-located AD-risk MoCA, TNF-alpha, and correlation effect values.
Upgrades the AD-risk finding from generated triage text to abstract-located evidence wording.
Corrects the IPF randomized-pilot sample size and adds abstract-located dose schedule details.
Adds an abstract-located IPF scheduled-dose and planned-assessment completion endpoint.
Adds an abstract-located IPF scheduled-dose and planned-assessment completion result.
